vocab.meaning: bị thu hút về phía/có xu hướng chọn
vocab.example: I’ve always struggled with rote learning, so I naturally gravitated towards Design where practical creativity is key.
My decision to study Sociology stems from a deep-seated desire to understand the root causes of social inequality.

vocab.meaning: theo kịp/cập nhật những thay đổi mới nhất
vocab.example: I chose Computer Science primarily because I wanted to keep up with the breakneck pace of technological advancement.

vocab.meaning: bị cuốn hút vào một lĩnh vực/hoạt động nào đó
vocab.example: After reading a few case studies, I was completely drawn into the world of Forensic Science.

vocab.meaning: gợi ý/chỉ ra một hướng đi phù hợp
vocab.example: My high school aptitude tests all pointed toward a career in Engineering, given my strength in spatial reasoning.

vocab.meaning: cân nhắc kỹ lưỡng (ưu và nhược điểm)
vocab.example: I spent months weighing up the pros and cons of different majors before deciding that Marketing was the most versatile option.

vocab.meaning: phù hợp với (tầm nhìn/giá trị/lối sống)
vocab.example: Studying Hospitality fits in with my long-term goal of managing a boutique hotel chain in the future.

vocab.meaning: nghiên cứu/tìm hiểu kỹ thông tin
vocab.example: I started looking into International Relations after becoming fascinated by global political shifts during the elections.

vocab.meaning: vô tình bắt gặp (cơ hội hoặc thông tin)
vocab.example: I chanced upon an online course in UX Design and immediately realized it was the perfect blend of psychology and art.

vocab.meaning: lựa chọn (thường là sau khi cân nhắc các phương án khác)
vocab.example: Despite my parents' pressure to study Medicine, I eventually opted for Archaeology to follow my true passion.
